MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-24-2021 Off Calendar

Defendants Uber Technologies, Inc.; Rasier, Llc; And Rasier-Ca, Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion Seeking An Order To Conduct A Neurological Independent Medical Examination, Including A Neuro-Psychological Assessment, Including An Order To Extend The Discovery Cut-Off Date To Complete Neurological Independent Medical Examination
Off Calendar Jun-25-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court notes email received from moving party to withdraw the motion, The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RASIER LLC and RASIER-CA, LLC's Motion Seeking An Order To Conduct A Neurological Independent Medical Examination, Including A Neuro-Psychological Assessment, Including An Order To Extend The Discovery Cut-Off Date To Complete Neurological Independent Medical Examination is off per request of moving party to withdraw the motion.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
